tools.title: Presence
tools.subtitle: Video Calls
tools.description: Peer-to-peer video calls with screen sharing.

versions.changelog:
- Improves connection retry behavior
- Fixes bugs in screen-sharing connections and re-connections
- Fixes bugs in circle-mode view-ports and auto-resizing according to window shape
- Separates screen-shares from people, and allows resizing pane

Fixes:

- improved connection reliability
-fixed bugs that caused initial video connection to appear and then drop with no audio
fixed bugs in how connection status indicators appear.

Features

-TURN relay indicator: yellow hub icon appears in connection details overlay when the ICE candidate pair uses a TURN relay server

Fixes:

- improved connection initiation
- improved connection status ui

Features

- ability to reset media tracks
Debugging: more connection details in log-collection

- Adds Share-Asset feature
- Improves UI to emphasize joining the main room
- Moves settings from room window to main Pressence window

- Adds Share-Asset feature
- Improves UI to emphasize joining the main room
- Moves settings from room window to main Pressence window
